title: ReportPlayer
description: A plugin for Reporting System with Editable GUI, Textes and With Discord Webhook System
body:
![Minecraft Chat View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3319082497147dab3f81262ef0067c14769f5469.png)![Discord Report Channel View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f200a011e7e842814fd65332671bd3870ced56b2.png)                 ![Minecraft Gui View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffd15a29ebf9dd898bb0ad3a5dac3a7a48b35a41.png)                  📌ReportPlayerEN

ReportPlayerEN is a powerful and user-friendly Minecraft moderation plugin that allows players to easily report rulebreakers through a clean GUI menu. All reports are automatically saved and can also be forwarded to a Discord channel via Webhooks.

✨ Features

📋 Simple command: /report <player> opens a customizable GUI.

🎨 Customizable GUI: Fully configurable via gui.yml (slots, items, names, lores).

🔒 Fixed inventory: Players cannot take items from the GUI.

🌐 Discord Webhook integration: Send reports directly to a Discord channel (webhook.yml).

💾 Persistent storage: All reports are saved in reports.yml with:

Report ID

Reporter name

Reported player name

Reason

Timestamp

🛠 Easy configuration: Change titles, item names, lores, and messages.

✅ Lightweight and efficient: No unnecessary features, only what’s needed.

⚡ Commands

/report <player> → Opens the report GUI for the chosen player.

📂 Configuration Files

gui.yml → Customize GUI title, slots, items, names, and lore.

webhook.yml → Set up your Discord webhook and customize the report message format.

reports.yml → Automatically generated storage of all submitted reports.

🖼 Example GUI

Players select from reasons such as:

Cheating

Swearing

Harassment

Bug Abuse

Disturbing

+18 Skin

Server Disrespect

Illegal Item

🚀 Why use ReportPlayerEN?

This plugin is designed for servers that value fair play and quick moderation. Instead of messy chat reports, players use a clear GUI, making reports structured and reliable. Perfect for small and large servers alike!

⚠️ Requires: Minecraft 1.21+ (Spigot/Paper API)
